features.title: Everything you need

items.title: Appointments & bookings

items.desc: Manage products, inventory, prices and orders from an intuitive dashboard.

items.title: Client CRM
items.desc: Full history per client, internal notes, loyalty points and advanced segmentation.

items.title: Email marketing
items.desc: Newsletters, automated campaigns and open tracking to retain more clients.

items.title: Blog & content
items.desc: Publish articles, FAQs and photo galleries to rank higher on Google.

items.title: Reports & analytics
items.desc: Visualize revenue, appointments, new clients and trends with real-time charts.

how.title: 3 simple steps

steps.title: Create your site

steps.title: Configure modules

steps.title: Share and grow
steps.desc: Share your link, start receiving clients and manage everything from your dashboard.
